description: The Ferrari 488 GTB, produced from 2015 to 2019, is powered by a twin-turbocharged 3.9-litre V8 producing 661 bhp. As Ferrari's first turbocharged mid-engine V8 since the F40, the 488 set new performance benchmarks. The Pista variant, with 710 bhp, is the most collectible version and commands a significant premium.
